vocab.meaning: thành phố hiện đại ngột ngạt với quá nhiều nhà cao tầng
vocab.example: Living in the city center feels like being trapped in a concrete jungle, surrounded by towering skyscrapers on every side.
A massive apartment complex was recently built right in front of my house, and it completely obstructs the view of the mountains.

vocab.meaning: làm cho những thứ xung quanh trở nên nhỏ bé
vocab.example: There is a new commercial tower that absolutely dwarfs the surroundings, making the traditional houses look like miniature toys.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường theo cách thiếu kiểm soát)
vocab.example: The rapid urban sprawl in my district has led to a proliferation of high-rise buildings where there used to be open fields.
Just a stone's throw from my apartment is an architectural marvel that attracts tourists from all over the city.

vocab.meaning: giá thuê nhà cao chót vót
vocab.example: Because of the luxury high-rises nearby, the area has become quite gentrified with sky-high rent prices.

vocab.meaning: làm lộn xộn/che lấp đường chân trời
vocab.example: While some people appreciate modern design, I feel that these massive structures simply clutter the skyline.

vocab.meaning: khu phức hợp (nhà ở, văn phòng, thương mại)
vocab.example: The tall building across the street is a mixed-use development, featuring a shopping mall on the lower floors and residential units above.

vocab.meaning: đổ bóng xuống (thường gây thiếu ánh sáng cho nhà xung quanh)
vocab.example: In the late afternoon, the nearby office towers cast a long shadow over our garden, keeping it cool but a bit dim.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở vật chất hiện đại bậc nhất
vocab.example: Many of the high-rises in my neighborhood boast state-of-the-art facilities, including rooftop infinity pools and private cinemas.
